channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Southern California chemical tank at risk of exploding as 40,000 residents are ordered to evacuate
item.description: Authorities are bracing for the possibility that a damaged chemical tank at a facility in Southern California could leak or explode.

item.title: Investigators looking for cause of fatal New York explosion that also wounded over 30 firefighters
San Francisco immigration court shuts down after purge of judges, leaving asylum cases in chaos
